selection_source.current_submission_defaults: Current participant q0/q1 answers canonicalized into selected_drug and selected_dose tokens

peer_context_source: peer_plot_submission_cache rows where has_complete_scales = 1 and canonical pair = psilocybin + medium
self_polygon_source: ASC factor scores from the current submission kept in memory
peer_overlay_source: score rows returned for matching peers from peer_plot_scores_query.csv
excluded_rows: 6f9d0e2c-1234-4ad9-acde-8b9df7301f00 because the current submission is excluded from peer comparison
peer-e-2026-03-19 because its canonical pair is alcohol + high
rendered_layers: purple self polygon and self points
peer rings or density layer positioned on each ASC axis
peer median polygon and peer median points
